name: Minimum Security Requirements for Federal Information and Information Systems
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Minimum Security Requirements for Federal Information and Information Systems. NIST publication NIST.FIPS.200.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF marker-extracted to markdown. extract_fips_200.py produces two structured outputs: (1) per-section CSV/JSON for the 4 body sections (Purpose, Impact Levels, Minimum Security Requirements, Security Control Selection); (2) per-family CSV/JSON for the 17 minimum-security control families enumerated in §3 (AC, AT, AU, CA, CM, CP, IA, IR, MA, MP, PE, PL, PS, RA, SA, SC, SI), each with its minimum-requirement statement.

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.
